title: Tree-Based Models Path
description: Build fluency in Tree-Based Models inside Clustering by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Pairwise Ranking
steps.summary: Pairwise Ranking belongs to the Clustering area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Clustering / Tree-Based Models. Compare it with Fuzzy C-Means and J-Measure, Information Gain. It opens into pairwise similarity ranking and Pairwise Ranking Loss (LambdaRank).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Fuzzy C-Means
steps.summary: Fuzzy C-Means belongs to the Clustering area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Clustering / Tree-Based Models. Start after k-Means and Fuzzy Systems.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: J-Measure, Information Gain
steps.summary: J-Measure, Information Gain belongs to the Clustering area of AI/ML, within Tree-Based Models. It sits inside Clustering / Tree-Based Models. Start after V-Measure and Information Gain.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
